intro.text1: Wirtschaft & Recht aus einer Hand. Damit Sie Ihre finanzielle Kontrolle zurückgewinnen.
intro.text2: Sie stehen vor schwierigen wirtschaftlichen Entscheidungen, kämpfen mit Schulden oder planen den Schritt nach Litauen?
intro.text3: Wir sind die Kanzlei, die wirtschaftliche Expertise mit anwaltlicher Präzision verbindet – für Privatpersonen und Unternehmen in Deutschland und Litauen.

value.desc1: We merge law and economics to create sustainable, long-term solutions.
value.desc2: Specialized expertise for the German-Lithuanian market.
value.desc3: Proactive restructuring designed to avoid traditional insolvency.

servicesSection.title: Strategic Focus for Your Success
servicesSection.sideTitle: A few decisive steps toward the best legal solutions for your enterprise.

clusters.title: Corporate Consulting & Law
clusters.headline: Business and Law from a Single Source: Your Success in Focus
clusters.content: We analyze structures, lead negotiations, and secure company formations. Avoid the 'Founder’s Trap' by selecting the optimal legal framework.

clusters.title: Restructuring & Insolvency
clusters.headline: Corporate Restructuring: Turning Crisis into Opportunity
clusters.content: Specialized focus on StaRUG and ESUG. We prevent standard insolvency to preserve your reputation and maintain control.

clusters.title: Specialty: Germany & Lithuania
clusters.headline: Your Partner for German-Lithuanian Economic Relations
clusters.content: Bilingual contracts, market entry strategies, and legal protection for exporters and investors.
clusters.hoverMicrocopy: Secure your market entry into the Baltic region.

items.title: No Waiting Time
items.description: Appointments often available within 48 hours. No long waiting times when you need support.

items.title: Free Initial Assessment
items.description: Get to know us and explore your options – completely without financial risk.

items.title: Fair Pricing
items.description: Transparent cost structure. No hidden fees. Installment payments often possible.

items.title: Germany & Lithuania
items.description: Business and law from a single source. International experience for your security.

process.title: Your Path to a Solution in 4 Steps
